title: Mega Abomasnow Battle Guide
summary: A [Grass]/[Ice] mixed attacker that auto-sets snow via [snow-warning] — [blizzard] never misses in snow, and 132/132 offenses support both sides.
strengths: Benefits from snow's [Ice]-type special defense boost
weaknesses: Seven weaknesses total — worst defensive profile among Megas

recommendedMoves.reason: Mega turn and setup turn safety

recommendedItems.reason: Mandatory Mega Stone with no alternative

bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Mega Abomasnow is a [trick-room] attacker that auto-sets snow with [snow-warning], making [blizzard] a 100% accuracy spread move in doubles. 132/132 Attack and Special Attack allow mixed sets, and the snow defensive bonus to [Ice] types (+50% Special Defense) partially compensates for its poor defensive profile.

## Strengths
Snow automatic setup enables [blizzard] spam without worrying about accuracy. 132/132 offenses let Mega Abomasnow pick the attacking stat that best beats the current match-up. [wood-hammer] punishes [Water]/[Ground] walls, and [blizzard] blows up [Dragon]/[Flying] cores. In snow, the Special Defense boost helps it trade with special attackers.

## Weaknesses & Answers
4x [Fire] is a death sentence. Seven weaknesses — [Fire], [Fighting], [Poison], [Flying], [Bug], [Rock], [Steel] — make switch-in reads punishing. Speed 30 locks it to [trick-room] cores.

## Recommended Moveset
[wood-hammer] is the main physical [Grass] STAB. [blizzard] is the auto-accurate spread [Ice] nuke. [ice-shard] provides priority when [trick-room] ends and Speed becomes a liability. [protect] is mandatory for Mega and setup timing.

## Item · Ability · Tera
[abomasite] is mandatory. [snow-warning] activates after Mega Evolution. Tera [Steel] dramatically improves the defensive profile by neutralizing the [Fire] 4x and patching multiple other weaknesses. Tera [Ice] stacks STAB.

## Teammates & Synergy
[trick-room] setters like [dusknoir] or [hatterene] are mandatory. Cover the [Fire] weakness with [Water] or [Rock] partners. [follow-me] and [fake-out] support extends Mega Abomasnow's survival window.

## Play Patterns
Switch in behind a [trick-room] setter, Mega evolve to trigger snow, and start pressuring with [blizzard] and [wood-hammer]. Save [ice-shard] for the late game when [trick-room] wears off. Tera defensively on a telegraphed [Fire] hit to survive.
